; reTasker: create or open a real notebook from the viewer.
;
; Injects a message-broker listener into MainView.qml (the always-instantiated
; top-level view container) so it is alive on the home screen and inside a
; notebook alike. The AppLoad viewer can't reach xochitl's controllers (separate
; QML engine), so it fires "retasker.newnote"; the native bridge in
; retasker-capture.so does the filesystem lookups (the "reTasker" folder, and any
; existing note with the same name) and forwards here over the broker pipe.
;
; Payload is JSON: {"name":"<title>","folder":"<uuid|empty>","existing":"<uuid|empty>"}.
; If a note for that day already exists we just open it; otherwise we create one
; in the reTasker collection (creating the collection if the bridge found none)
; and open it -- using xochitl's own path, so no restart and correct on-disk format.
;
; Plaintext identifiers resolve via the qt-resource-rebuilder hashtab, same as
; the other reTasker qmds.

AFFECT /qml/device/view/main/MainView.qml
    IMPORT net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker 2.0

    TRAVERSE ?#root
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            XoviMessageBroker {
                id: retaskerNoteBroker
                listeningFor: ["retasker.newnote"]

                function onSignalReceived(sgn, message) {
                    var req = {};
                    try { req = JSON.parse(message); } catch (e) { req = {}; }
                    var name = req.name ? req.name : "reTasker note";

                    // A note for this day already exists -> just open it.
                    if (req.existing && Library.entryForId(req.existing)) {
                        root.explorer.open(req.existing);
                        print("[retasker-newnote] opened existing " + req.existing + " name='" + name + "'");
                        return req.existing;
                    }

                    // Reuse the reTasker folder the bridge found, else create it.
                    var folderId = req.folder;
                    if (!folderId || !Library.entryForId(folderId))
                        folderId = Library.createCollectionWrapper("", "reTasker");

                    var id = LibraryController.createDocument(folderId, name);
                    var doc = Library.entryForId(id);
                    if (!doc) { print("[retasker-newnote] entryForId NULL for id=" + id); return "" + id; }
                    LibraryController.setOrientation(doc.id, Qt.Vertical);
                    root.explorer.open(doc.id);
                    print("[retasker-newnote] created+opened " + doc.id + " in folder " + folderId + " name='" + name + "'");
                    return "" + id;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
